linkedin.notes: Primary — professional service providers (FAs, coaches, recruiters, CRE, MSPs) are most active on LinkedIn

facebook.notes: Niche-specific Facebook groups across all 5 target verticals

reddit.notes: r/msp, r/recruiting, r/CommercialRealEstate, r/Entrepreneur for cross-niche BD pain signals

hubspot.notes: AltusFlow HubSpot portal 246530361. Always check existing contacts before qualifying. All pushes use client_id=ALT00.

meta_ads.notes: Disabled — AltusFlow own prospecting is outbound-only, no paid ads

calendly.notes: Austin's direct discovery call link. Used in all approved messages for AltusFlow own pipeline.
